articles.title: I have a duty to stay on, says Starmer, as he justifies defence spending decisions
articles.description: Sir Keir Starmer argues he has made "hard-edged" decisions, one day after his defence secretary quit in a row over money.

articles.title: King leads tributes to late British art 'giant' David Hockney
articles.description: The artist, who has died at the age of 88, "was one of life's true originals", King Charles says.

articles.title: Trump accuses Iran of leaking agreement details that 'bear no relation to the truth'
articles.description: The US president's reaction came as Iranian media reported purported details from the alleged agreement that included much of what Tehran has been demanding and the US rejecting.
